baseline.note: README badge claims 96% — drift to fix (actual 91.5%)

cross_family_verifiers.discipline: verify returned model field == requested modulo -cloud suffix (tier-timeout falls back to local hermes3:8b); 2-3 families vote on every HIGH/CRITICAL (convergence = highest confidence); synthesize against code, do not relay; cloud runs server-side (zero local GPU)
cross_family_verifiers.harness: adapted from E:/AI/readouts/xrpl-knowledge/scripts/verify_cloud.py (crash-safe incremental, _norm_model fallback guard, refute-by-default external rubric)

orchestration: Workflow tool (audit fan-out only) + coordinator-driven cross-family verify harness (Ollama Cloud) + coordinator synthesis-against-source

product_caveats.circular_omega: alt-test omega is still the model-jury bootstrap (no human labels yet); ALL judge seats provisional; below-quorum escalates to Claude Designer. Director-deferred — do NOT fake a human-labeling round. DO audit honest disclosure + escalation correctness.

domains.kernel-core: kernel.py, roles.py, sandbox.py, budget.py, engagement.py, framing.py, eval_awareness.py, puzzle.py, types.py
domains.scoring-stats: scoring/oracle.py, scoring/judge_panel.py, scoring/stats.py, observability.py, trace.py, attestation.py
domains.characterize: characterize/*.py (metrics, profile, aggregate, run, human_labels, panel_store)
domains.test-integrity: tests/*.py, conftest.py, fixtures (cross-cutting: vacuous/half-invariant tests, flake, coverage gaps)
domains.ci-supply-docs: .github/workflows/*.yml, pyproject.toml, verify.sh + honesty surfaces (README/SCORECARD/SHIP_GATE/SECURITY/CHANGELOG) — FOUND not fixed by agents; docs coordinator-authored per LAW

phases.stage-a: Bug/Security/Correctness/Eval-integrity audit -> cross-family verify -> review gate -> amend (v2 mechanics)
